members.name: ClearBreakpoints
members.summary: Clears all breakpoints.

members.name: Debug
members.signature: public void Debug(bool canContinue, bool isErrorBreakpoint)
members.summary: Starts a debug break in script execution, optionally specifying whether the program can continue based on [param can_continue] and whether the break was due to a breakpoint.

members.name: GetDepth
members.summary: Returns the current debug depth.

members.name: GetLinesLeft
members.summary: Returns the number of lines that remain.

members.name: HasCapture
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a capture with the given name is present otherwise [code]false[/code].

members.name: HasProfiler
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a profiler with the given name is present otherwise [code]false[/code].

members.name: InsertBreakpoint
members.signature: public void InsertBreakpoint(int line, StringName source)
members.summary: Inserts a new breakpoint with the given [param source] and [param line].

members.name: IsActive
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the debugger is active otherwise [code]false[/code].

members.name: IsBreakpoint
members.signature: public bool IsBreakpoint(int line, StringName source)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param source] and [param line] represent an existing breakpoint.

members.name: IsProfiling
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a profiler with the given name is present and active otherwise [code]false[/code].

members.name: IsSkippingBreakpoints
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the debugger is skipping breakpoints otherwise [code]false[/code].

members.name: LinePoll
members.summary: Forces a processing loop of debugger events. The purpose of this method is just processing events every now and then when the script might get too busy, so that bugs like infinite loops can be caught.

members.name: ProfilerAddFrameData
members.signature: public void ProfilerAddFrameData(StringName name, Array data)
members.summary: Calls the [code]add[/code] callable of the profiler with given [param name] and [param data].

members.name: ProfilerEnable
members.signature: public void ProfilerEnable(StringName name, bool enable, Array arguments)
members.summary: Calls the [code]toggle[/code] callable of the profiler with given [param name] and [param arguments]. Enables/Disables the same profiler depending on [param enable] argument.

members.name: RegisterMessageCapture
members.signature: public void RegisterMessageCapture(StringName name, Callable callable)
members.summary: Registers a message capture with given [param name]. If [param name] is "my_message" then messages starting with "my_message:" will be called with the given callable. The callable must accept a message string and a data array as argument. The callable should return [code]true[/code] if the message is recognized. [b]Note:[/b] The callable will receive the message with the prefix stripped, unlike [method EditorDebuggerPlugin._capture]. See the [EditorDebuggerPlugin] description for an example.

members.name: RegisterProfiler
members.signature: public void RegisterProfiler(StringName name, EngineProfiler profiler)
members.summary: Registers a profiler with the given [param name]. See [EngineProfiler] for more information.

members.name: RemoveBreakpoint
members.signature: public void RemoveBreakpoint(int line, StringName source)
members.summary: Removes a breakpoint with the given [param source] and [param line].

members.name: ScriptDebug
members.signature: public void ScriptDebug(ScriptLanguage language, bool canContinue, bool isErrorBreakpoint)
members.summary: Starts a debug break in script execution, optionally specifying whether the program can continue based on [param can_continue] and whether the break was due to a breakpoint.

members.name: SendMessage
members.signature: public void SendMessage(String message, Array data)
members.summary: Sends a message with given [param message] and [param data] array.

members.name: SetDepth
members.summary: Sets the current debugging depth.

members.name: SetLinesLeft
members.summary: Sets the current debugging lines that remain.

members.name: UnregisterMessageCapture
members.summary: Unregisters the message capture with given [param name].

members.name: UnregisterProfiler
members.summary: Unregisters a profiler with given [param name].
